summary:
The `test.sh` script ran successfully, and "ALL TESTS PASSED". This confirms that the Nginx upstream port mismatch has been resolved. The "needle" was the incorrect port number (5001 instead of 5000) in the `proxy_pass` directive within the Nginx configuration file `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`.

The fix involved changing the `proxy_pass` directive from `http://127.0.0.1:5001;` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000;` in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default`.
